title: onopordum tauricum subsp. horridum
intro: Onopordum tauricum subsp. horridum, commonly known as the thistle of Horridum, is a subspecies of the thistle plant, specifically native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and parts of Europe. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, digestive issues, and skin problems. The thistle plant offers several health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. The herbal preparations of Onopordum tauricum subsp. horridum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from minor digestive issues to more serious conditions.
